title: Session
description: Example shape for a server-side opaque session row. Store token_hash only — never plaintext token.

id.description: Session id (opaque). Prefer UUID or ULID.

token_hash.description: One-way hash of the cookie token (e.g. SHA-256 hex). Plaintext token MUST NOT be stored.

csrf_token.description: CSRF secret for double-submit; required when using default CSRF strategy.

idle_expires_at.description: Sliding idle expiry; optional if only absolute TTL is used.

revoked_at.description: Set on logout/revoke; null if active.
